features: Helps strengthen your protective moisture barrier
description: Product Description Be kind to your skin with our Ceramide Body Wash. Our hydrating wash gently cleanses dry and sensitive skin whilst helping to protect the natural moisture barrier. Formulated with our skin barrier complex of 5 Ceramides, moisture-locking Hyaluronic Acid and Glycerin along with skin soothing Oats, this cleanser helps to wash away impurities and dirt, leaving skin clean, moisturised and hydrated. Give your skin the extra care it deserves! Vegan Friendly & Fragrance Free. Ingredients Water (Aqua), Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamide DEA, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Ceramide AP, Ceramide AS, Ceramide NP, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide NS, Citric Acid, Avena Sativa (Oat) Meal Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Tetrasodium EDTA, Caprylyl Glycol, Chlorphenesin. Directions Apply 2-3 pumps on to damp skin and gently massage before rinsing with warm water. Safety Warning Use only as directed. If product gets into eyes, rinse with water. See more
